lines.speaker: Alon
lines.line: You've been staring at that herb bundle for ten minutes, Finn.

lines.speaker: Finn
lines.line: Checking if you overcharged me. Wouldn't put it past you.

lines.speaker: Alon
lines.line: I didn't. But I'm curious why you came to my table.

lines.speaker: Finn
lines.line: Your sage is better. Don't read into it.
